faq.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to know about ReviewWeb
faq.q1: What types of websites can ReviewWeb analyze?
faq.a1: ReviewWeb can analyze virtually any publicly accessible website. Our multi-layer scraping engine handles static sites, JavaScript-rendered pages, and even sites behind anti-bot protection.
faq.q2: How accurate is the AI analysis?
faq.a2: We use 25+ AI models including Claude, GPT-4, and Gemini to cross-validate results. Our analysis covers content quality, SEO, accessibility, and performance with high accuracy.
faq.q3: Is my data stored or shared?
faq.a3: No. We process your requests in real-time and do not store website content or analysis results on our servers. Your data privacy is our priority.
faq.q4: What AI models do you use?
faq.a4: We integrate with 25+ models through OpenRouter, including Claude by Anthropic, GPT-4 by OpenAI, and Gemini by Google. The best model is automatically selected for each analysis task.
faq.q5: Can I use ReviewWeb for competitive analysis?
faq.a5: Absolutely. Analyze any public website to extract SEO data, content structure, meta tags, and more. Batch processing lets you compare multiple competitors at once.
faq.q6: What's the rate limit on the free tier?
faq.a6: The free tier includes 100 requests per month with up to 5 requests per minute. No credit card required to get started.
faq.q7: Do you offer custom enterprise plans?
faq.a7: Yes. Contact us for custom rate limits, dedicated support, SLA guarantees, and volume pricing tailored to your needs.
